Fetches cover art from external sources (Cover Art Archive)

get.description: Returns an artist image file with tag-based cache validation. Supports profile, background, banner, and logo images.
Returns an album cover image file with appropriate cache headers. Supports tag-based cache busting.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Resize preset: thumb (200px), small (300px), medium (500px). Omit for original.

parameters.name: tag
parameters.description: Cache tag for cache busting (MD5 hash of filepath:mtime)

get.description: Returns a custom uploaded cover file
get.summary: Serve custom album cover by ID

get.description: Returns a custom uploaded image file
get.summary: Serve custom artist image by ID

get.description: Returns a boolean indicating if the image exists
Returns a boolean indicating if the cover exists
Returns metadata for album cover including tag for cache busting
Returns a user avatar image file with appropriate cache headers.
Returns a custom favicon image for a radio station identified by stationUuid.
Returns metadata for all available images of an artist (without downloading)
Returns all configuration settings (admin only)
Returns all settings in a specific category (admin only)
Returns a specific configuration setting by key (admin only). Returns null if not found.

200.description: Setting retrieved successfully (or null if not found)

put.description: Updates or creates a configuration setting (admin only)

delete.description: Deletes a configuration setting, resetting it to default value (admin only)

post.description: Validates an API key for an external service (Last.fm or Fanart.tv) by making a test request (admin only)

requestBody.description: Service and API key to validate

400.description: Invalid request

post.description: Lists directories and subdirectories for file browser (admin only)
Validates a storage path for metadata (checks permissions, space, etc.) (admin only)

get.description: Returns the server name for federation. Generates a random default name if not configured.

isDefault.description: True if the name was just auto-generated

get.description: Returns the server color for federation identification.

post.description: Clears the in-memory settings cache (admin only)
Reloads settings for all external metadata agents (Fanart.tv, Last.fm). Use this after updating API keys.
Resets enrichment state for artists/albums that were marked as processed but have no external data. Use this after configuring API keys to re-process items that were skipped.

onlyWithoutExternalData.description: Only reset items that have no external data (recommended)

post.description: Resets enrichment state for items without external data and starts the enrichment queue. Useful after configuring API keys for the first time.
post.summary: Reset enrichment state and start queue

get.description: Returns statistics about metadata storage usage, including total size, file counts, and averages (admin only)

post.description: Detects and removes files that are not referenced in the database. Use dryRun=true to preview without deleting (admin only)

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: Preview mode - show what would be deleted without actually deleting

post.description: Performs complete cleanup: removes orphaned files AND expired cache entries. Use dryRun=true to preview file deletions without actually deleting (admin only). Note: Cache cleanup always runs (no dry-run for cache entries)

parameters.name: dryRun
parameters.description: Preview mode for file deletion - show what would be deleted without actually deleting

post.summary: Run full cleanup (orphaned files + expired cache)

post.description: Recalculates and updates storage size for all artists with external metadata (admin only)

get.description: Checks if all files referenced in the database actually exist on disk (admin only)
Returns configured storage paths for data, music, metadata, etc. (admin only)
Returns current status of the enrichment queue including pending items, progress, and estimated time (admin only)

isRunning.description: Whether the queue is currently processing

post.description: Starts the background enrichment queue. Processes artists first (to get MBIDs), then albums. Items are processed one at a time with rate limiting delays (admin only)
Stops the background enrichment queue. Current processing will complete but no new items will be started (admin only)
Removes incorrect image URLs (file:// paths or API URLs) from the database. After cleaning, artists can be re-enriched to download images correctly (admin only)
Scans the storage directory for existing image files and updates database with correct file paths. Use this after cleaning to restore references to physically existing files (admin only)
post.summary: Sync database with physical image files

post.description: Auto-generates orderAlbumName and orderArtistName for existing records. This is needed once after migration to enable alphabetical sorting (admin only)
post.summary: Populate sorting names for existing albums and artists

get.description: Retrieve paginated list of pending conflicts with optional filters by entity type, source, or priority
Retrieve detailed information about a specific metadata conflict

post.description: Accept the suggested value and apply it to the entity. MusicBrainz suggestions are auto-applied.

200.description: Conflict accepted and changes applied successfully

post.description: Reject the suggested value and keep the current metadata
Mark conflict as ignored - will not appear in pending list anymore

get.description: Retrieve all pending conflicts for a specific album, artist, or track

post.description: For conflicts with multiple MBID suggestions (Picard-style), apply a specific suggestion by index

suggestionIndex.description: Index of the suggestion to apply (0-based)

userId.description: User ID who is applying the suggestion

400.description: Invalid suggestion index or conflict not found

get.description: Search for artist matches in the MusicBrainz database

Retrieve album details from MusicBrainz using their MBID

post.description: Assigns a MusicBrainz MBID to an artist and triggers automatic metadata enrichment
Assigns a MusicBrainz MBID to an album and triggers automatic metadata enrichment

get.description: Searches MusicBrainz for potential matches for an artist that does not yet have an MBID
Searches MusicBrainz for potential matches for an album that does not yet have an MBID
Retrieve current MusicBrainz ID auto-search settings

confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum score (0-100) to auto-apply MBID without user confirmation

description.example: Auto-search finds MusicBrainz IDs during library scan. Scores ≥95 are auto-applied, 75-94 create conflicts for review, <75 are ignored.

confidenceThreshold.description: Minimum score (75-100) to auto-apply MBID. Recommended: 95 for safety, 90 for more automation.

400.description: Invalid configuration (threshold must be 75-100)

get.description: View statistics about MBID auto-search activity (how many were auto-applied, conflicts created, etc.)

conflictsCreated.description: Conflicts created for manual review (medium confidence)

get.summary: Stream de notificaciones en tiempo real (SSE)

get.summary: Stream de track desde servidor remoto

post.description: Conectarse a un servidor de un amigo usando su token de invitación. Si requestMutual es true, se enviará una solicitud para que el servidor remoto también pueda ver tu biblioteca.

502.description: Error al conectar con el servidor remoto

get.description: Obtiene todos los servidores a los que el usuario está conectado

patch.description: Actualiza propiedades del servidor como el color temático

post.description: Actualiza la información del servidor remoto
Comprueba si los servidores conectados están online y actualiza su estado
post.summary: Verificar estado de todos los servidores

post.description: Comprueba si un servidor específico está online
Crea un token que otros pueden usar para conectarse a tu servidor

get.description: Obtiene todos los tokens de invitación creados por el usuario
Obtiene todos los servidores que tienen acceso a tu biblioteca

delete.description: Revoca el acceso de un servidor a tu biblioteca. Con ?permanent=true elimina permanentemente.

parameters.name: permanent
parameters.description: Si es true, elimina permanentemente el token

delete.summary: Revocar o eliminar acceso de servidor

post.description: Reactiva el acceso de un servidor que fue revocado previamente

patch.description: Actualiza los permisos (browse, stream, download) de un servidor que tiene acceso a tu biblioteca

get.description: Obtiene los servidores que han solicitado federación mutua

200.description: Lista de servidores con solicitud mutua pendiente

get.summary: Listar solicitudes de federación mutua pendientes

post.description: Aprueba la solicitud y conecta automáticamente al servidor que la solicitó

200.description: Solicitud aprobada y conectado al servidor

404.description: Access token no encontrado o sin solicitud pendiente

post.description: Rechaza la solicitud de federación mutua (el servidor sigue pudiendo acceder a tu biblioteca)
Usado por otros servidores para establecer conexión

get.description: Verifica que el servidor está disponible y el token es válido

post.description: Notifica que el servidor remoto se está desconectando

get.description: Retorna la biblioteca con álbums paginados
Retorna datos de análisis DJ (BPM, key, energía, bailabilidad) para todos los tracks del álbum
get.summary: Obtener análisis DJ de tracks del álbum

get.description: Hace streaming de un track para reproducción
Retorna todos los metadatos del álbum incluyendo LUFS, ReplayGain, MusicBrainz IDs para importación
Descarga un álbum completo como ZIP

post.description: Inicia la importación de un álbum desde un servidor federado conectado. El progreso se puede seguir via WebSocket conectando a /federation y escuchando eventos import:progress

403.description: No tienes permiso para descargar de este servidor

502.description: Error al conectar con el servidor remoto

get.description: Lista todas las importaciones del usuario actual
Obtiene el estado de una importación específica
Server-Sent Events para recibir actualizaciones de progreso de importación en tiempo real. Pasa token JWT como query param ya que EventSource no soporta headers.

post.summary: Join a listening session by invite code

get.summary: Get current user active session (as host or participant)
Get session details including participants and queue

post.summary: Add a track to the session queue
Skip to the next track in the queue
Invite a friend to the listening session
Remove a track from session queue (host only)

info.title: Echo Music Server API
info.description: API REST para servidor de música con streaming, gestión de álbumes, artistas y playlists. Construido con arquitectura hexagonal y NestJS.

tags.name: social
tags.description: Friends, activity feed, and listening updates

userId.description: User ID who resolved the conflict

mustChangePassword.description: Whether user must change password on first login

refreshToken.description: Refresh token to obtain new access token

currentPassword.description: Current password (required unless mustChangePassword is true)

showTopTracks.description: Show top tracks on public profile

showTopArtists.description: Show top artists on public profile

showTopAlbums.description: Show top albums on public profile

showTopTracks.description: Mostrar top canciones en el perfil público

showTopArtists.description: Mostrar top artistas en el perfil público

showTopAlbums.description: Mostrar top álbumes en el perfil público

bio.example: Amante de la música indie y el jazz

Configuración de las secciones del home

temporaryPassword.description: Temporary password for the new user (must be changed on first login)

storageDetails.description: Detailed storage information when warning is active

byEntityType.description: Enrichment counts grouped by entity type
